_comment: Per-episode intro/outro overrides. Key format: '<tmdbId>/<season>/<episode>'. Times in seconds. Anime is fetched from AniSkip API automatically; use this file for non-anime series or to override AniSkip data.
_example: 1399/1/1 represents Game of Thrones S01E01 (TMDB ID 1399). Replace with real entries below.
